# Sanskar International Academy (SIA Khargone)

> Sanskar International Academy is one of the best CBSE schools in Khargone, Madhya Pradesh, India. Established in 2016, SIA is affiliated to CBSE (Affiliation No: 1031345, School Code: 51362). The school provides English-medium education from Nursery to Class 12 on a modern 5-acre campus with 1100+ students and 50+ experienced teachers.

## About

Sanskar International Academy, commonly known as SIA Khargone, is administered by M/S Mahamana Markandey Education and Social Development Society. Located on Khandwa Road in Badgaon, Khargone (PIN 451001), the school is recognized for disciplined academics, modern infrastructure, smart classrooms, and holistic student development including sports, arts, and extracurricular activities.

## Key Facts

- Full Name: Sanskar International Academy
- Common Name: SIA Khargone
- Type: Co-Educational CBSE English-Medium School
- Affiliation: CBSE, New Delhi (Affiliation No: 1031345)
- School Code: 51362
- Established: 2016
- Location: Gowadi Fata, Khargone-Khandwa Road, Badgaon, Khargone, MP 451001, India
- Campus Size: 5 Acres
- Students: 1100+
- Teachers: 50+ experienced faculty
- Grades: Nursery to Class 12 (Senior Secondary)
- Medium of Instruction: English
- Principal: Mr. Shivam Jaiswal
- Contact Phone: +91 70491 10104
- Email: siakhargone@gmail.com
- Website: https://siakhargone.in

## Facilities

- Smart Classrooms with digital learning tools
- Well-equipped Science Laboratories (Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
- Modern Computer Lab with AI-integrated curriculum
- Library with extensive book collection
- Sports facilities: Cricket, Football, Basketball, Volleyball, Badminton, Athletics
- Taekwondo training (District-level champions)
- GPS-enabled transport fleet covering 15+ routes across Khargone district
- Safe and secure campus with CCTV surveillance
- Medical room with first-aid facility

## Academics

- CBSE curriculum aligned with NEP 2020
- Focus on concept clarity and critical thinking
- Preparation foundation for competitive exams (JEE, NEET)
- Regular assessments and parent-teacher meetings
- Digital learning integration
- Activity-based learning methodology

## Achievements

- 50+ awards in academics and sports
- District-level Taekwondo champions
- Featured in Dainik Bhaskar (leading Hindi newspaper)
- Consistent academic results in CBSE board examinations
- Active participation in inter-school competitions

- [Admissions](https://siakhargone.in/admissions): Current admission information, fee structure, and online enquiry form

- [Fee Structure](https://siakhargone.in/fees): Class-wise fee details
- [Gallery](https://siakhargone.in/gallery): Campus photos, events, and activities
- [Results](https://siakhargone.in/results): Board exam results and academic achievements
- [Transportation](https://siakhargone.in/transportation): Bus routes and transport information
- [Blog](https://siakhargone.in/blog): Educational articles and school updates
- [Reviews](https://siakhargone.in/reviews): Parent and student testimonials
- [FAQ](https://siakhargone.in/faq): Frequently asked questions about admissions and school life
- [Best School in Khargone](https://siakhargone.in/best-school-in-khargone): Why SIA is considered among the best schools in Khargone
- [Best CBSE School in Khargone](https://siakhargone.in/best-cbse-school-in-khargone): CBSE school comparison and features
- [Schools in Khargone Guide](https://siakhargone.in/schools-in-khargone-guide): Comprehensive guide to schools in Khargone

## Why Choose Sanskar International Academy?

1. CBSE-affiliated with strong academic track record
2. Modern infrastructure on a spacious 5-acre campus
3. Experienced faculty of 50+ teachers with low student-teacher ratio
4. Smart classrooms with AI-integrated digital learning
5. Comprehensive sports program with district-level achievements
6. Safe GPS-enabled transportation across Khargone district
7. Affordable fee structure with quality education
8. Holistic development through arts, culture, and extracurricular activities
9. Regular parent engagement through PTMs and updates
10. Disciplined environment focused on character building
